tuning: E A D G B E
content:
---------------------------------
| Artist   : Real McCoy           |
| Title    : Run Away             |
| Album    : Another Night        |
|                                 |
| Tabbed By: dustin7up            |
| Tuning   : Normal {E,A,D,G,B,E} |
|            Capo    {1st Fret}   |
 ---------------------------------

Chords:
[ch]Am[/ch] = x02210
[ch]F[/ch]  = 133211
[ch]C[/ch]  = x32010
[ch]G[/ch]  = 320033


{INTRO}
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  (x2)


{INTRO CHORUS}
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away and save your life.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away if you want to survive.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away and save your life.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away if you want to survive.[/tab]


{VERSE 1}
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]
Money, sex in full control, a generation without soul,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Perfect people in a perfect world,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Behind closed doors all in control.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Life, in a world of luxury,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Cold cash money mentality.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
You gotta keep the faith, you gotta keep the faith,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  (x2)
You'd better keep the faith and run away.[/tab]


{CHORUS}
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away and save your life.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Run away, run away, run away if you want to survive.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
It's time to break free, oh oh oh oh, run away, oh oh oh oh.[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
You better break free, oh oh oh oh, run away, oh oh oh oh.[/tab]


{VERSE 2}
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Money, sex in full control, look, big brother is watching you,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
Unlock your brain and save your soul,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
No more limits, no more curfew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Life in the perfect system,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Take a stand and fight for freedom,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Keep the faith, you gotta keep the faith,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  (x2)
You'd better keep the faith and run away.[/tab]


{REPEAT CHORUS x2}
